normalization: temporary paths replaced with <tmp> in every observation
raw frame digests preserve terminal controls, carriage returns, trailing padding, and trailing empty lines
readable frame lines additionally remove terminal controls and trailing render padding
metadata.scenarios: one deterministic no-network/no-credential/no-native-clipboard scenario per visible built-in command
divergences: /share uses upstream local HTML export behavior per docs/DECISIONS.md instead of upstream gist upload
